algorithm_name: Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) and Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations (LIME)

inputs.candidate_features: Structured attributes of job applicants (e.g., education, experience, demographic information) used as input to the hiring prediction model

outputs.hiring_prediction: Binary or probabilistic decision indicating candidate suitability
outputs.explanations: SHAP and LIME importance values highlighting feature contributions to the prediction
outputs.fairness_metrics: Quantitative measures of bias (e.g., demographic parity, equal opportunity)
